title: FOLKTIME - 211info
text: FOLKTIME INC FOLKTIME Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Member-run social program and drop-in center for adults with a mental health diagnosis. Programs include craft projects, games, guest speakers, and discussions on current topics of interest. Hot lunches prepared and shared on site. 4837 NE Couch Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Age 18 and older individuals who identify as having lived experience with mental health and substance use challenges. Potential attendees should be committed to recovery and participation in a positive community and have no recent or ongoing history of violence. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 10am-2pm; meals served at noon Email (503) 238-6428 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 238-6428 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or complete referral form on website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 10am-2pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: One block from TriMet line #20, four blocks from line #19 Services: Congregate Meals/Nutrition Sites * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness General Recreational Activities/Sports * Mental Health Issues Mental Health Drop In Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FOLKTIME INC
